name_cn:
NÉONOÉ Medium Bag #️⃣M44021
Exclusive global launch! This item is custom-made using the same craftsmanship as the boutique version, with dynamic chip code changing. Original factory exclusive fabric, original factory exclusive light gold electroplated full steel hardware (color consistent with authentic)
Please compare with the authentic French version if needed!
We ensure 100% restoration of the authentic feel! Exclusive authentic original factory fabric, hardware, edge oil, stitching + authentic craftsmanship, official website's latest full gift box!
26 x 26 x 17.5 cm
(Length x Height x Width)
Monogram coated canvas
Calfskin trim
Microfiber lining
Metal hardware
Drawstring
Metal grommets
Compartment
Center zip pocket
Strap: Removable, adjustable
Half-length: 33.0 cm
Adjustable up to: 56.0 cm
Made in France
